meta.purpose: Traceability matrix linking every D9 design element to Canon Laws 5, 7, 11, 14-16 and DEVELOPER.md references.
meta.coverage: 100% of design elements mapped ÔÇö no orphan components.

elements.evidence: Core loop subscribes to EventBus (LAW 5), analyzes deterministically (LAW 7), no global state (LAW 11), trace_id propagation (LAW 12).
Writes to CodeGraph via atomic file swap only (LAW 15), validates coupling/risk thresholds (LAW 14/16), never imports CodeGraph classes (┬º17.9).
Flags nodes with risk_score > 0.8 (LAW 16), tracks observability data (LAW 5), classifies failure patterns from unreliable workers (LAW 10).
Classifies drift severity per emo-guard thresholds, triggers enforcement gate for BLOCKING/CRITICAL severity.
EventBusÔåÆFeedbackLoopÔåÆCouplingAdjusterÔåÆCodeGraphÔåÆAlertÔåÆEventBus, all with trace_id.
DriftSeverity maps to emo-guard thresholds, ViolationType maps to Canon violation types.
trace_id, execution_id, node_id, outcome, duration_ms, resource_consumed, feedback_signals, timestamp.
confidence, sample_size, delta with boost threshold references, target_component (w_graph/w_sem), SafeWeightBoundaries [0.2, 0.8].
baseline_hash, current_hash, deviation_score, violation_type, severity, source_module, target_module, law_refs.
execution_count, failure_rate, coupling_increase, risk_score, is_hotspot, recommendation.
min_confidence=0.75, min_sample_size=20, weight_min=0.2, weight_max=0.8, drift thresholds matching emo-guard.
State machine for weight update lifecycle.
IDLE ÔåÆ TRACE_CAPTURED ÔåÆ METRIC_AGGREGATED ÔåÆ THRESHOLD_CHECKED ÔåÆ [WEIGHT_ADJUSTED|ALERT_TRIGGERED|NO_OP|REJECTED] ÔåÆ COOLDOWN ÔåÆ IDLE
min_confidence >= 0.75, min_sample_size >= 20, SafeWeightBoundaries [0.2, 0.8], rate limit 3/hr (LAW 11), coupling delta <= 0.1 (LAW 14), risk delta <= 10 (LAW 16).
Atomic file swap protocol, 4 forbidden patterns (┬º17.9), 6-step sync matrix with determinism guarantees.
metadata.json write is deterministic (atomic swap + SHA-256), score computation is pure function (baseline + traces). Only file watch is non-deterministic (read-only).
Max 3 adjustments/hr, 20 min cooldown, 5 min between alerts, 6 alerts/hr/node.
Full 5-layer flow from ExecutionEngine ÔåÆ EventBus ÔåÆ FeedbackLoop ÔåÆ CodeGraph ÔåÆ Enforcement Gate.
trace_id propagates through all 7 steps from EventBus to MetricsStore.
trace_id in EventBus payload ÔåÆ TraceEvent ÔåÆ WeightUpdateSignal ÔåÆ DriftAlert ÔåÆ MetricsStore.
14 event types across 4 namespaces with explicit hook points per FeedbackLoop method.
capture <1ms, analyze <10ms, adjust <5ms, commit <50ms, alert <2ms, full loop <100ms.
capture_trace(duplicate trace_id ÔåÆ no-op), analyze_impact(pure function), apply_adjustment(same signal_id ÔåÆ dedup), commit(atomic swap), publish(alert_id dedup).
EventBus flood ÔåÆ SAMPLE, ring buffer full ÔåÆ DROP_OLDEST, FS contention ÔåÆ RETRY, CodeGraph locked ÔåÆ DEFER, alert flood ÔåÆ RATE_LIMIT.
4 allowed patterns, 3 forbidden patterns, pre-commit AST scan for runtime imports in CodeGraph.
Per-instance ring buffer, per-scope rate limiter, scoped weight adjustments, pre-commit scan for `_global_`.
10-trace real-time, 50-trace standard, 200-trace trend, 1000-trace baseline with sliding windows.

canon_refs_used.LAW 5: Observable ÔÇö capture_trace via EventBus subscription, all models carry trace_id
canon_refs_used.LAW 7: Deterministic ÔÇö score computation is pure function, idempotency guarantees on all operations
canon_refs_used.LAW 11: No global state ÔÇö per-instance ring buffers, per-scope rate limiters, scoped weights
canon_refs_used.LAW 12: Traceable ÔÇö trace_id propagated through all events, models, alerts
canon_refs_used.LAW 14: CodeGraph-derived boundaries ÔÇö coupling thresholds, boundary violation detection
canon_refs_used.LAW 15: Graph update before refactor ÔÇö atomic file swap, commit_boundary_update
canon_refs_used.LAW 16: Decompose risk > 0.8 ÔÇö HotspotDetector, IRuntimeArchitectureAlert, emo-guard thresholds
canon_refs_used.┬º5.3: Self-Tuning ÔÇö boost thresholds, w_graph/w_sem, SafeWeightBoundaries [0.2, 0.8]
canon_refs_used.┬º5.4: Guardrails ÔÇö DriftMonitor thresholds (weight drift > 0.35, strategy collapse > 70%)
canon_refs_used.┬º5.5: Execution Memory ÔÇö trace_id propagation, session event log
canon_refs_used.┬º3.4.5: emo-guard ÔÇö coupling delta >0.05 warning, >0.1 block, risk >10 block
canon_refs_used.┬º15.6: Dependency Governance ÔÇö allowed/forbidden dependency patterns
canon_refs_used.┬º17.9: CodeGraph MUST NOT depend on runtime ÔÇö file protocol only, 4 forbidden import patterns
canon_refs_used.┬º17.10: CodeGraph outputs ÔÇö metadata.json, edges.json, atomic file swap protocol
